name: Employer in Sandy says my stress PTSD from a workplace accident isn't covered, is that true?
description: Not true; Utah covers PTSD with strong medical proof of work causation.[1]

mainEntity.name: Employer in Sandy says my stress PTSD from a workplace accident isn't covered, is that true?

acceptedAnswer.text: Not true; Utah covers PTSD with strong medical proof of work causation.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Utah covers mental health claims like PTSD if objective medical evidence shows it exceeds everyday job stress and arises from employment.[1] It's not automatically barred.[1] Key factors: Need proof beyond normal pressures; tied to specific incident; medical documentation essential.[1] Push back with psychiatrist reports and file Form 122. An attorney can challenge denials effectively.
